candidates.why: Financing-related current debt and an STD component.
Current borrowings line appears under current liabilities and excludes the separate lease liabilities row.
Looks like a current debt total, but it equals borrowings + bank overdraft + lease liabilities in the latest year, so it would include leases and is not preferred for baseline STD.

variables.notes: Chose the minimal current debt components that exclude lease liabilities. Avoided 'Current interest-bearing debt' because it appears to include the separate lease liabilities row.
